creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text: It seems that the updated vuln.xml didn't make it out of the ports tree and into wherever "pkg audit -F" fetches it from, as it told me "vulnxml file up-to-date". Manually copying vuln.xml from /usr/ports/security/vuxml/vuln.xml to /var/db/pkg/vuln.xml stopped the complaint. Thanks!
